Plan Your Visit

Off the CUF

Food. Friendship. Faith.

Off the CUF is a relaxed monthly gathering where everyone is welcome. Come and enjoy food, great conversation, and a friendly space.

📅 When

First Saturday
each month

⏰ Time

10:30 – 12:00

☕ Cost

Free

What to Expect

A welcoming space with food, conversation, and a short reflection. Whether you're new or have been before, there's a place for you here.

Come along

No booking needed – just turn up.

Get Directions
